## What problem does this solve?
A clear description of the problem or gap you're experiencing.

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context
Screenshots, mockups, or examples that help illustrate the idea.
